message:
test(fcp-core): add comprehensive audit chain unit tests (un5y)

Add 55 unit tests covering audit chain primitives per FCP2 §23:
- AuditEvent chain tests: hash linking, monotonic seq, follows()
- AuditHead tests: quorum signatures, coverage tracking
- ZoneCheckpoint tests: head bindings, multi-head coordination
- DecisionReceipt tests: content-addressed, reason codes, evidence
- Fork detection tests: same-seq divergence, checkpoint halting
- TraceContext tests: W3C trace propagation
- Golden vector tests: deterministic serialization roundtrips
- Edge case tests: optional fields, overflow handling

All tests pass and clippy clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
